steps.title: Find the subject of the relative clause
steps.content: The blank fills a verb in the clause "a document that ______ the basic freedoms." The relative pronoun "that" refers back to "a document" — a singular noun — and acts as the clause's subject. The verb must agree with that singular subject.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'have outlined': plural verb form; does not agree with the singular subject "that" (= a document). ✗
  • Choice B — 'were outlining': plural past-progressive verb; does not agree with the singular subject. ✗
  • Choice C — 'outlines': singular present verb; agrees with the singular subject "that" (= a document). ✓
  • Choice D — 'outline': base form used for plural subjects; does not agree with the singular subject. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
